title: Junior Frontend Developer
roleSummary: Build and maintain UI features in a product team while learning modern frontend practices.
roleSummaryHu: UI funkciok fejlesztese es karbantartasa termekcsapatban, modern frontend gyakorlatok mellett.
responsibilities: Implement responsive screens from existing design specs.
Fix UI bugs and improve usability with guidance from seniors.
Write clean, testable JavaScript code and participate in code reviews.
responsibilitiesHu: Reszponziv kepernyok implementalasa meglevo design specifikacio alapjan.
UI hibak javitasa es hasznalhatosag fejlesztese senior tamogatassal.
Attekintheto, tesztelheto JavaScript kod irasa es code review reszvetel.

title: Mid Frontend Developer
roleSummary: Own feature delivery end-to-end in a React codebase and collaborate closely with product and design.
roleSummaryHu: Onallo feature szallitas React kodbazisban, szoros egyuttmukodesben termek es design csapattal.
responsibilities: Design component structure and state flows for medium-complexity features.
Improve performance, accessibility and reliability of existing UI flows.
Mentor juniors through pairing and thoughtful pull request feedback.
responsibilitiesHu: Komponens strukturak es state flow-k tervezese kozepes komplexitasu funkciokhoz.
Meglevo UI folyamatok teljesitmenyenek, akadalymentessegenek es megbizhatosaganak javitasa.
Junior fejlesztok tamogatasa paros programozassal es ertelmes PR visszajelzessel.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
roleSummary: Lead backend architecture decisions for scalable services that support product-critical APIs.
roleSummaryHu: Skalazhato backend szolgaltatasok architekturajanak vezetese, uzletileg kritikus API-k tamogatasara.
responsibilities: Build and operate robust services in Python or Go.
Drive API and data model design for high-throughput workloads.
Guide teams on observability, incident handling and engineering standards.
responsibilitiesHu: Stabil szolgaltatasok fejlesztese es uzemeltetese Python vagy Go technologiaval.
API- es adatmodell-tervezes nagy terhelesu rendszerekhez.
Csapatok tamogatasa monitorozasban, incidenskezelesben es engineering standardokban.

title: Data Analyst
roleSummary: Translate business questions into reliable analyses and dashboards that drive product decisions.
roleSummaryHu: Uzleti kerdesek atalakitasa megbizhato elemzesekke es dashboardokka a termekdontesek tamogatasara.
responsibilities: Analyze product funnels and user behavior with Python and SQL.
Create clear dashboards and communicate insights to non-technical partners.
Maintain data quality checks and document analysis assumptions.
responsibilitiesHu: Termekfunnel es felhasznaloi viselkedes elemzese Python es SQL segitsegevel.
Egyertelmu dashboardok keszitese es insightok kommunikacioja nem technikai partnereknek.
Adatminosegi ellenorzesek fenntartasa es elemzesi feltetelezesek dokumentalasa.

title: Product Manager
roleSummary: Shape product direction, align engineering and business priorities, and deliver measurable customer impact.
roleSummaryHu: Termekirany meghatarozasa, engineering es uzleti prioritasok osszehangolasa, merheto ugyfelhatas szallitasa.
responsibilities: Own roadmap prioritization and communicate trade-offs clearly.
Run discovery with users and convert insights into actionable backlog items.
Coordinate cross-functional execution across engineering, design and stakeholders.
responsibilitiesHu: Roadmap priorizalas tulajdonlasa es trade-offok egyertelmu kommunikacioja.
Felhasznaloi discovery folyamat vezetese es insightok backlogge alakitasa.
Keresztfunkcionalis vegrehajtas koordinacioja engineering, design es stakeholder oldalrol.
